name: Lisgrafica - Impressao e Artes Graficas, S.A.
summary: Lisgrafica-Impressao e Artes Graficas provides printing services in Europe and Central America. It prints magazines, newspapers, supplements, catalogs, brochures, and telephone directories. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Barcarena, Portugal. Lisgrafica-Impressao e Artes Graficas is a subsidiary of Rasografica Comercio e Servicos Graficos.
